title: Define Word Extension
shortDescription: Type a word to get its definition
description:
A Command Palette (PowerToys) extension that provides on-the-fly definitions!
It uses dictionaryapi.dev's free API to retrieve definitions for the word, and display as list items for each definition of the word along with its part of speech.
For longer definitions, you can view the details pane of the list item by clicking `Ctrl` + `Enter`
